drifted.spec_text: Body IDs can be optionally overridden by the user
drifted.actual: Preset functions do not expose id parameter; auto-generate only. SimulationCommands.addSphere does accept id option.

drifted.spec_text: MUST be loadable in FSI without requiring a full application build
drifted.actual: DLL is FSI-loadable but no convenience .fsx script was created as planned in research.md
